name: Rails 8 + Hotwire
service_entrypoint: bash -c 'if [ -f tmp/pids/server.pid ]; then pid=$(cat tmp/pids/server.pid 2>/dev/null || true); if [ -n "$pid" ]; then kill "$pid" 2>/dev/null || true; fi; rm -f tmp/pids/server.pid; fi; bin/rails db:prepare && exec bin/rails server -b 0.0.0.0 -p %(ENV_PORT)s'
notes: Default stack. Backed by vendor/rails-starter; uses Zo's pg-15 on 5432.
